commands.install: sudo install -m 0755 -d /etc/apt/keyrings && curl -fsSL https://download.docker.com/linux/ubuntu/gpg | sudo gpg --batch --yes --dearmor -o /etc/apt/keyrings/docker.gpg && sudo chmod a+r /etc/apt/keyrings/docker.gpg && echo "deb [arch=$(dpkg --print-architecture) signed-by=/etc/apt/keyrings/docker.gpg] https://download.docker.com/linux/ubuntu $(. /etc/os-release && echo \"$VERSION_CODENAME\") stable" | sudo tee /etc/apt/sources.list.d/docker.list >/dev/null && sudo apt-get update && sudo apt-get install -y docker-ce-cli docker-buildx-plugin docker-compose-plugin
commands.upgrade: sudo apt-get update && sudo apt-get install -y docker-ce-cli docker-buildx-plugin docker-compose-plugin

commands.install: mkdir -p {{cache_dir}} {{bin_dir}} && asset={{cache_dir}}/'eza_x86_64-unknown-linux-musl.tar.gz' && curl -fsSL 'https://github.com/eza-community/eza/releases/download/v0.23.4/eza_x86_64-unknown-linux-musl.tar.gz' -o "$asset" && tmp="$(mktemp -d)" && case "$asset" in *.zip) unzip -q "$asset" -d "$tmp" ;; *.tar.gz|*.tgz) tar -xzf "$asset" -C "$tmp" ;; *) cp "$asset" "$tmp/"{{binary}} ;; esac && found="$(find "$tmp" -type f -perm -111 -name {{binary}} | head -n 1)" && test -n "$found" && cp "$found" {{bin_dir}}/{{binary}} && chmod +x {{bin_dir}}/{{binary}}

commands.install: sudo mkdir -p -m 755 /etc/apt/keyrings && wget -qO- https://cli.github.com/packages/githubcli-archive-keyring.gpg | sudo tee /etc/apt/keyrings/githubcli-archive-keyring.gpg >/dev/null && sudo chmod go+r /etc/apt/keyrings/githubcli-archive-keyring.gpg && echo "deb [arch=$(dpkg --print-architecture) signed-by=/etc/apt/keyrings/githubcli-archive-keyring.gpg] https://cli.github.com/packages stable main" | sudo tee /etc/apt/sources.list.d/github-cli.list >/dev/null && sudo apt-get update && sudo apt-get install -y gh

options.install: arch=$(uname -m); case $arch in aarch64) asset=nvim-linux-arm64 ;; *) asset=nvim-linux-x86_64 ;; esac; mkdir -p $HOME/.local; curl -fsSL https://github.com/neovim/neovim/releases/latest/download/$asset.tar.gz | tar -xz -C $HOME/.local --strip-components=1
options.upgrade: arch=$(uname -m); case $arch in aarch64) asset=nvim-linux-arm64 ;; *) asset=nvim-linux-x86_64 ;; esac; curl -fsSL https://github.com/neovim/neovim/releases/latest/download/$asset.tar.gz | tar -xz -C $HOME/.local --strip-components=1
(cd $HOME/.oh-my-zsh && git pull --quiet); for p in zsh-autosuggestions zsh-syntax-highlighting; do git -C "${ZSH_CUSTOM:-$HOME/.oh-my-zsh/custom}/plugins/$p" pull --quiet; done
